allow: Bash(git commit -m 'fix\(index\): forward zone id to checkout URL and detect SmileOne zone requirement *)
Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=10 socialcircle-vps "ls -d /var/www/* /root/* /home/*/* 2>/dev/null | grep -i inefable; pgrep -af gunicorn | head -5")

Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes socialcircle-vps "find / -maxdepth 4 -iname '*inefable*' -not -path '/proc/*' 2>/dev/null | head -20; echo ---; docker ps --format '{{.Names}} {{.Image}}' 2>/dev/null | head -20")
Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=10 root@187.124.144.222 "hostname; ls -d /root/* /var/www/* /home/* 2>/dev/null | head -20")
Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes root@187.124.144.222 "ls /home/apps 2>/dev/null; echo ---; pgrep -af 'gunicorn' | grep -v grep | head -8")
Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes root@187.124.144.222 "cd /home/apps/web-a-inefablestore && git remote -v && git log --oneline -3 && git status --short | head -20")
Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes root@187.124.144.222 "cd /home/apps/web-a-inefablestore && git pull origin main && git log --oneline -1")

Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes root@187.124.144.222 'PID=$\(pgrep -f '\\''gunicorn.*web-a-inefablestore'\\'' -o\); echo master PID: $PID; kill -HUP $PID && sleep 2 && pgrep -f '\\''gunicorn.*web-a-inefablestore'\\'' | wc -l && curl -s -o /dev/null -w '\\''%{http_code}'\\'' http://127.0.0.1:5000/')
Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes root@187.124.144.222 "pgrep -af '[g]unicorn' | grep inefablestore; echo ---; curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}\\n' http://127.0.0.1:5000/")

Bash(ssh -o BatchMode=yes root@187.124.144.222 'MPID=$\(pgrep -f '\\''[g]unicorn -w 2 -b 127.0.0.1:5000'\\'' -o\); echo master: $MPID; kill -HUP $MPID; sleep 3; pgrep -af '\\''[g]unicorn -w 2 -b 127.0.0.1:5000'\\''; curl -s -o /dev/null -w '\\''health: %{http_code}\\n'\\'' http://127.0.0.1:5000/')
